reset_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to reset to system default API docs? This operation will overwrite all your current documents!
delete_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete this node? All articles under this directory will be deleted as well!
editor_placeholder: Use Markdown to write document content. Supports bold, code blocks, tables, callouts, etc...
dir_node_desc: Directories are usually used for grouping and displaying accordion menus. To write articles, select the directory in the left outline and click its 'New Sub-Article' icon.
system_desc: Please select a document from the left outline tree to edit, or use the bottom-left corner to create directories and articles.
form_slug_help_dir: As a category route prefix, e.g. guide
form_status_help: Make publicly visible immediately after creation
msg_drag_not_dir: Cannot drop inside a non-directory file
translate_warning: Please enter Chinese title or content first
translate_success: AI translation completed. Please review and save.
cat_settings_desc: Current node is 'Category Directory', used for grouping multi-level menus.
slug_dir_desc: This alias will be used as the route prefix for all documents under this category (e.g. /docs/guide/doc0015).
tips_desc: To write specific tutorial content for this category, select the directory in the left outline and click its 'New Sub-Article' icon to create a document node.
client_plugin_disabled_desc: The DocsApi plugin is currently disabled by the site administrator. Please contact the administrator to enable it.
client_empty_desc: Select an outline node to start reading the document
client_palette_placeholder: Type document or category name to search...
